---
title: "CV"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](Jonathan_Kellogg_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

A full curriculum vitae is available as a PDF at the link above. Below is a condensed overview.

## Education

**DPhil in Politics**, University of Oxford (Balliol College), 2026–2029 *(expected)* \
Supervisors: Prof. Ben Ansell and Prof. David Rueda

**MPhil in Politics (European Politics and Society)**, University of Oxford (Wolfson College), 2024–2026 \
Supervisor: Prof. David Rueda. Year 1: Distinction. \
Thesis: *Frankenstein's Bills: The Political Utility of Disjointed Legislation.*

**MSc in Economics (Behavioural Economics and Game Theory)**, University of Amsterdam, 2023–2024 \
GPA 7.8/10. Thesis: *Make and Break? Four Strategic Voting Games of "Kingmaker" Parties* (supervisor: Prof. Arthur Schram).

**Exchange Semester, Data Science and Economics**, Grinnell College, Spring 2022.

**BSc Liberal Arts and Sciences (Governance, Economics and Development)**, Leiden University College The Hague, 2020–2023 \
GPA 3.75/4.0, cum laude.

## Public Engagement

**[Room for Discussion](https://roomfordiscussion.com/committee-members/jonathan-kellogg-de-cock-buning/)**, Committee Member & Interviewer, 2023–2024 \
On-stage interviewer at the University of Amsterdam's flagship student interview platform. Full interview portfolio at the link above.

## Awards

- AI Governance Fellowship, The Hague Effective Altruism / Leiden University College, 2023.
- World Champion (EFL category), World Universities Debating Championship, 2019.

## Technical skills

R · Stata · Python · LaTeX · Git · GIS · survey design · LLM-assisted text analysis

## Languages

English (native/fluent) · Dutch (native)

## Contact

[jonathan.kellogg@politics.ox.ac.uk](mailto:jonathan.kellogg@politics.ox.ac.uk)
